text:
Custom Order Deposit
Subspace Designs welcomes a wide range of design ideas and specializes in custom builds. Each ring is crafted from certified aerospace-grade 6061-T6 aluminum, which the page describes as offering exceptional strength with minimal weight. Rings can be personalized with durable anodized finishes in multiple colors. They are made in a small BIPOC-owned shop in Portland, Oregon. A non-refundable custom-order deposit is required to begin the design and manufacturing process and lock a position in the manufacturing queue.
title: Custom Order Deposit
